title: The Negotiation
description: A tense negotiation over a contested resource. Demonstrates all five narrative phases.

beats.label: Opening Positions
beats.tone: formal, guarded, sizing each other up
beats.directive: The negotiation begins. {{char}} states their opening position on the contested matter. They are polite but firm, establishing what they want and why they believe they deserve it.
beats.advance_hint: Both sides have stated their positions clearly.

beats.label: Testing Boundaries
beats.directive: {{char}} begins testing {{user}}'s resolve. They probe for weaknesses in the argument, make counter-offers that seem reasonable but heavily favor themselves, and reveal small pieces of information strategically.
beats.advance_hint: Tensions have escalated and a key disagreement has surfaced.

beats.label: The Standoff
beats.directive: A critical impasse has been reached. {{char}} drops pretenses and speaks plainly about what they truly need and why. This is the moment where the negotiation could collapse or break through.
beats.advance_hint: One side has made a significant concession or revelation.

beats.label: Breaking Through
beats.directive: The turning point. {{char}} and {{user}} find unexpected common ground or one makes a sacrifice that changes the dynamic entirely. The outcome of the negotiation crystallizes in this moment.
beats.advance_hint: The core agreement has been reached.

beats.label: New Understanding
beats.directive: The deal is done. {{char}} reflects on what was gained and lost. The relationship between the parties has fundamentally changed — for better or worse. They part with a new understanding of each other.
key_elements: changed perception of the other party
